history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person is seated, looking directly at the camera. They are wearing a black beanie that covers their forehead and the top of their head, and mirrored sunglasses with red lenses that obscure their eyes. A black ski mask or balaclava covers their nose and mouth. They have a black strap from a bag slung across their chest over a white t-shirt. The t-shirt has a graphic design with red lettering that reads "COTTON BOIL" and other text and images, including what appears to be a bird. The background is a room with pink and light blue walls. To the left, there are shelves with various bottles and containers. The lighting is dim and appears to be artificial, casting shadows and giving the scene a slightly mysterious or edgy mood. The overall color palette is dominated by the pink wall, the white t-shirt, and the dark beanie and mask, with pops of red from the sunglasses and t-shirt graphics. The style is candid and somewhat informal.
